governing_law.value: Laws of the State of Delaware
governing_law.exact_text: This Agreement shall be governed by and interpreted under the laws of the State of Delaware without regard to its conflicts of law provisions.

fields.payment_terms: four equal quarterly installments beginning on May 31, 2000
fields.notice_period: 30 days after written notice of breach
fields.liability_cap: neither party will be liable for any special, indirect, consequential, exemplary or incidental damages
